task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus main dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'admin' in the user profile section).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to create a new scheduled report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Schedule Report' (or similar) for creating a new scheduled report is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the report name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Weekly Security Summary' is entered into the 'Report Name' or 'Schedule Name' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule frequency is set to Weekly on Mondays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Weekly' option is selected in the frequency dropdown or radio buttons, and 'Monday' is selected or checked in the day selection area.

task_completion.description: Verify the report format is set to PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'PDF' option is selected in the report format or export type dropdown/radio button list.

task_completion.description: Verify the email recipient is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email address 'security-team@company.local' is entered into the 'To' or 'Email Address' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the scheduled report configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Report scheduled successfully') is displayed, or the newly created 'Weekly Security Summary' report appears in the list of scheduled reports.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the ADAudit Plus application, not terminal commands, API clients (like Postman), or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text and selections are visible inside the ADAudit Plus form fields, not typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual proof of submission, such as a loading spinner after clicking save, a success toast/message, or the report appearing in a summary table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scheduled report must be named 'Weekly Security Summary'. The schedule frequency must be 'Weekly' and set to run on 'Monday'. The export format must be 'PDF'. The email recipient must be 'security-team@company.local'.
